name: Kapok Tree Inn Corn Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, baking powder, sugar, and salt.
2. Add the egg, milk, and corn. Stir until all ingredients are well blended.
3. Using a spoon or spatula, drop teaspoonfuls of batter into hot fat (maintain at 350°F/175°C).
4. Fry the fritters, turning once with a spoon to ensure even cooking, until they are golden brown.
5. Remove the fritters from the fat and drain on paper towels.
6. Serve the fritters immediately while hot on a warm platter.
7. Sprinkle confectioners sugar over the fritters before serving.
